benefits.description: PT-141 (Vyleesi brand) works. Major effects had delayed onset by hours and lasted over 24 hrs. Increased sensation persisted for months after single use.
Increased sensation still present months after single dose

side_effects.description: Potential for nausea prevented with Zofran pre-medication

protocol_notes: Used brand name Vyleesi. Insurance coverage available. Pre-medicated with Zofran to prevent nausea. Has multiple unused boxes.
